sources.title: Abbott's new Libre Assist app feature tackles in-the-moment food decisions — CES 2026
sources.claim_supported: Abbott launched Libre Assist at CES 2026 (January 5); generative AI meal guidance free for FreeStyle Libre users; 7M+ existing CGM user base; color-coded glucose impact prediction before eating

sources.title: Signos Secures $20M to Expand CGM Use Beyond Diabetes Into Weight Loss
sources.claim_supported: Signos raised $20M in May 2026 from GV, Dexcom, Blue Cross Blue Shield of Alabama; first FDA-cleared OTC CGM for weight management; 10x growth in 6 months; partnership with Dexcom Stelo biosensor
